description_long: This bungalow features a low-pitched, cross-gabled roof with textured shingles and a sprawling single-story layout. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with several windows of varying sizes distributed asymmetrically around the structure. A prominent covered porch area is visible, providing sheltered outdoor space, and the main entrance is set back beneath the roof overhang. The building sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with paved walkways and what appear to be display boards or signage near the front. The roof extends over the porch and garage, creating deep eaves for shade and weather protection. The overall design is practical and modern, with clean lines and a focus on horizontal proportions.
description: A single-story bungalow with a cross-gabled roof, light exterior walls, and a covered porch, set on a green lawn with walkways and signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, garage, and signage on the lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the porch and the extension of the roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows and the back facade, with the roof's cross-gabled structure visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, windows, and the continuation of the roof overhang.
